content: I will view lines 150 to 180 of `lib/screens/tool_detail_screen.dart` to see exactly where the `position.latitude` and `position.longitude` properties are accessed so we can safely promote them to non-nullable values.
thinking:
**Fixing the Compilation Errors**

I've hit a snag. The analysis flagged two compile-time errors in `tool_detail_screen.dart`. It seems the `latitude` property is being accessed without proper null-safety checks, specifically on lines 167 and 168. The `position` variable was recently modified, which is likely the root cause of this null-related issue. Time to implement the necessary null-safety.
